summary: Operational Workflow Simulation Module testing completed. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. Simulation creates REAL orders in the database with proper workflow execution.
passed_tests: GET /api/simulation/metrics - Returns live operational metrics (200)
GET /api/simulation/metrics - Requires authentication (401/403)
GET /api/simulation/summary - Returns comprehensive simulation summary (200)
GET /api/simulation/summary - Requires authentication (401/403)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/patient-admission - Creates patient, IPD, and admission order (200)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/patient-admission - Requires authentication (401/403)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/clinical-order - Creates lab order with complete workflow (200)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/clinical-order - Requires authentication (401/403)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/pharmacy-order - Creates pharmacy order with dispatch/receive (200)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/pharmacy-order - Requires authentication (401/403)

POST /api/simulation/scenario/partial-dispatch - Requires authentication (401/403)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/return-order - Creates return order from completed order (200)
POST /api/simulation/scenario/return-order - Requires authentication (401/403)

POST /api/simulation/run-all - Requires authentication (401/403)

POST /api/simulation/reset - Requires authentication (401/403)
Verify simulation creates REAL orders visible in /api/orders
Verify simulation creates REAL patients visible in /api/patients
Frontend: Simulation page loads correctly with Live Operational Metrics
Frontend: Run All Scenarios button executes all 5 scenarios successfully
Frontend: Individual scenario buttons work (Patient Admission tested)
Frontend: Reset button clears simulation data (8 orders, 4 patients deleted)
Frontend: Real-time metrics update after scenarios run
Frontend: Recent Orders section shows simulation orders with correct prefixes
Frontend: Toast notifications display success/completion messages
Frontend: Verification Checklist updates based on scenario results
seed_data_creation: Simulation module creates and cleans up its own test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simulation module fully functional. All 5 scenarios work: Patient Admission (4 steps), Clinical Order/Lab (7 steps), Pharmacy Order (6 steps), Partial Dispatch (6 steps), Return Order (5 steps). Orders created have prefixes: ORD-, LAB-, PHR-, PRT-, RET-. Reset endpoint clears all simulation data. Admin auth required for all endpoints (phone: 8888888888, password: password). Metrics and Summary endpoints provide real-time operational data.

simulation_endpoints.GET /api/simulation/metrics: Returns orders_created_today, orders_dispatched_today, orders_pending, orders_completed_today, urgent_orders_pending, patients_admitted_today, billing_generated_today, department_workload
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/scenario/patient-ad: Creates patient, IPD, admission order, transitions to IPD phase
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/scenario/clinical-o: Creates lab order, routes to lab, dispatches, receives, completes, generates billing
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/scenario/pharmacy-o: Ward orders medicine, pharmacy dispatches, ward receives, completes
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/scenario/partial-di: Order 100 units, dispatch 40, dispatch 60, receive all, complete
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/scenario/return-ord: Find completed order, create return, dispatch back, receive return
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/run-all: Runs all 5 scenarios sequentially, returns summary
simulation_endpoints.POST /api/simulation/reset: Deletes orders with ORD-/LAB-/PHR-/PRT-/RET- prefixes and SIM- patients

frontend_page.live_metrics_section: Displays real-time operational metrics with Live badge
frontend_page.run_all_button: Executes all 5 scenarios and shows results with step counts
frontend_page.individual_scenarios: 5 scenario cards with play buttons and workflow descriptions
frontend_page.recent_orders: Shows simulation-generated orders with status badges

real_order_creation.note: Simulation creates REAL orders in database, not fake logs
